description_long: This is a medium-sized Amazon Prime shipping parcel made of brown corrugated cardboard. The box features the iconic Amazon smile logo on one side and the 'amazon.com Prime' branding on another, both printed in black and blue. The top of the parcel is sealed with black Amazon Prime-branded packing tape, which runs across the length of the box and is visible from multiple angles. A white shipping label is affixed to the top, indicating it is ready for delivery. The box has sharp, well-defined edges and a matte, slightly rough surface typical of cardboard packaging. Its overall appearance is clean, modern, and instantly recognizable as a commercial delivery package.
description: A brown Amazon Prime cardboard shipping box with branded tape, logo, and a shipping label, typical for parcel deliveries.
description_view_0: The front view shows the Amazon smile logo centered on a plain brown cardboard surface.
description_view_1: This view highlights the Amazon Prime-branded tape running down the center and the shipping label on the top.
description_view_2: The side view displays the 'amazon.com Prime' text and part of the shipping label, with the tape visible on top.
description_view_3: This view focuses on the tape running down the box and the plain brown cardboard, with the shipping label partially visible.
